category_title: Students with off-task 'silly' behavior influenced by peer proximity and task purpose
scenario_title: Teacher-directed group activities in music class
minimal_context: Sammy is participating in a teacher-directed group activity in music class while seated in the front row.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's begin our teacher-directed group activity for music class. Everyone take your seats in the front row; Sammy, sit right here next to your classmates.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits in the front row where there is unavoidable physical contact with the peer next to him) Get away from me!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's just focus on the music activity.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Starts making loud noises instead of participating) Beep beep beep!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please try to follow along with the group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues making noises, displays "silly" behavior, and makes inappropriate gestures toward the peers sitting closely next to him)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's begin our teacher-directed group activity for music class. Everyone take your seats in the front row; Sammy, sit right here next to your classmates.

STUDENT: (Sits in the front row where there is unavoidable physical contact with the peer next to him) Get away from me!

TUTOR: Let's just focus on the music activity.

STUDENT: (Starts making loud noises instead of participating) Beep beep beep!

TUTOR: Please try to follow along with the group.

STUDENT: (Continues making noises, displays "silly" behavior, and makes inappropriate gestures toward the peers sitting closely next to him)

context.environment: Music class in which students were engaged in teacher-directed group activities while seated in rows
context.social_setting: Sat in the front row very close to other students so that there was unavoidable physical contact

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: During the close proximity condition, Sammy sat in the front row very close to other students so that there was unavoidable physical contact
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Making noises, inappropriate gestures, and “silly” behavior in the classroom; no response or negative response or initiation to peers

behavior_patterns.condition: During academic activities with unavoidable physical contact
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Off-task behavior during academic activities; noise making or inappropriate talking
